calendar.matters:
Petition To Allow Modification Of Trust
Off Calendar Jan-05-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances via Zoom: Kirsten Howe, Esq. for Susan J. Logas (Petitioner).

The Court stated that it left the petition on calendar to see if anyone was appearing to object. The clerk stated that there were no other appearances on this matter.

There being no other the appearances, the Court took the matter under submission. The Court noted that this was a well-framed petition.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Deputy: K. Saephon/H. Singh. Matter not reported.
